versions.version_description: Key change included, plus corrections and additions in chords and lyrics
Simplified Chords in G. Easy to learn and easy to play.
Play-along chart Includes full lyrics, intro, slash and passing chords missing from previous versions submitted.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Complete chords and lyrics / well-aligned for easy auto-scrolling / short tabs for intro and verse patterns / suggestions for playable voicings and alternative chord choices.

content:
[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
There comes a time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]   
When we head a certain call[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]    
When the world must come together as one [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]   
There are people dying[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]   
And it's time to lend a hand to life [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]   
The greatest gift of all [/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]   
We can't go on [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]   
Pretending day by day [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]   
That someone, somewhere will soon make a change[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]   
We are all a part of [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]   
God's great big family [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
And the truth, you know love is all we need [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   
We are the world [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]   
We are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]   
We are the ones who make a brighter day [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]   
So let's start giving [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]   
There's a choice we're making[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]   
We're saving our own lives [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]   
It's true we'll make a better day [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]   
Just you and me [/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]   
Send them your heart[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   
So they know that someone cares [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   
And their lives will be stronger and free [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]   
As God has shown us[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]   
by turning stone to bread [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]   
So we all must lend a helping hand [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   
We are the world [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]   
We are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]

There's a choice we're making[/tab]

We're saving our own lives [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]   
It's true we'll make a better day [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]   
Just you and me [/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]  
When you're down and out[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   
There seems no hope at all [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]  
But if you just believe [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]   
There's no way we can fall [/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Am[/ch]   
Well, well, well, well, let us realize [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]   
That a change will only come [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]   
When we stand together as one [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   
We are the world [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]   
We are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
